steps.t: The lumber and crates are at the Orc-encampment of Drûmaudhul, north-west of Talan Fanuidhol. Bahanneth has asked you to sabotage the lumber the Orcs …
Bahanneth is at Talan Fanuidhol, south-east of Drûmaudhul. You should return to Bahanneth with the metal parts and let him know of your success.
